description: Instinct registry. Loaded by _instinct-activator.sh on every tool use. Add your own instincts or use /evolve to promote patterns.

levels.draft: Proposed by session-learner. Not injected. Review with /analyze-session.
levels.confirmed: User validated. Injected silently when trigger_pattern matches.
levels.permanent: Explicitly promoted via /promote. Highest priority in domain dedup.

domainDedup: One instinct per domain is injected per tool use. permanent > confirmed. Max 3 domains.

instincts.inject: Never hardcode secrets. Use environment variables. Add to .env.local, never commit.
Use conventional commits: feat/fix/chore/docs/refactor/test. Keep subject under 72 chars.
Handle errors explicitly. No silent catches. Log errors with context (what failed, why).
